text:
There once was a young man named Max who discovered a mysterious box under his bed. Each night, he opened it to find a tiny hummingbird. Despite his worries, the hummingbird grew bigger.

One evening, the hummingbird was large enough to perch on Max's finger. Intrigued, he took the hummingbird outside where it perched on the top of a flower.

Max asked, "Where do you come from?"

The hummingbird fluttered, "From the sky."

"What's your name?"

"I'm Ruby."

The next morning, Max woke to see Ruby perched on his head while he slept. It seemed to be quite heavy.

Max joked, "You must weigh a lot!"

Ruby chuckled softly. They continued this routine.

One afternoon, Max was gardening. Ruby flew onto a nearby branch and perched perfectly. He reached out and scratched its neck.

"I've never known anyone who talks birds," Max mused.
